name: desc-error-on-incomparable-key-types
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SortWithCmpResultNotNumber :message "sortWith comparator must return a Number, got Error" :actualType "Error" :actualValue !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :DescKeysNotComparable :message "desc cannot compare Number with String" :operand "desc" :leftType "Number" :rightType "String" :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "desc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 34 :line 1 :column 35 } :end { :offset 36 :line 1 :column 37 } } }] :effectful false :text "desc(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 29 :line 1 :column 30 } :end { :offset 37 :line 1 :column 38 } } } :input { :left {:k 1} :right {:k "a"} } } :trail [] } :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "sortWith" :args [{ :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "desc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 34 :line 1 :column 35 } :end { :offset 36 :line 1 :column 37 } } }] :effectful false :text "desc(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 29 :line 1 :column 30 } :end { :offset 37 :line 1 :column 38 } } }] :effectful false :text "sortWith(desc(/k))" :location { :start { :offset 20 :line 1 :column 21 } :end { :offset 38 :line 1 :column 39 } } } :input [{:k 1} {:k "a"}] } :trail [] }

expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :DescPairNotMap :message "desc requires a pair Map subject ({ :left x :right y }), got Number" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "desc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["x"] :effectful false :text "/x" :location { :start { :offset 10 :line 1 :column 11 } :end { :offset 12 :line 1 :column 13 } } }] :effectful false :text "desc(/x)" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 13 :line 1 :column 14 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: desc-with-recursive-let-key
query: let(:total, add(1, /children * total | sum)) | [{:children [{:children []}]} {:children [{:children [{:children []}]}]}] | sortWith(desc(total)) * total
